top_signals.title: Genesis Makes Rival Bid for Vault in $3.9 Billion Deal
top_signals.summary: Australian gold miner Genesis Minerals Ltd. has launched a last-minute cash and stock bid for Vault Minerals Ltd. which had already agreed to a deal with Regis Resources Ltd.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
